nodes.label: Radial Branching Rings — Two organic radial forms with dense inward-flowing feather/flame strokes emanating from bright central voids, overlapping like a figure-eight
nodes.norm_label: radial branching rings — two organic radial forms with dense inward-flowing feather/flame strokes emanating from bright central voids, overlapping like a figure-eight

nodes.label: Contour Dune Ridge — Tightly spaced parallel contour lines warped over sand-dune ridge forms with a sharp ravine cutting through, high-contrast B&W topographic aesthetic
nodes.norm_label: contour dune ridge — tightly spaced parallel contour lines warped over sand-dune ridge forms with a sharp ravine cutting through, high-contrast b&w topographic aesthetic

nodes.label: Contour Canyon Terraces — Dense parallel contour lines forming tall bulging column/terrace shapes, repeating tessellated organic volumes like packed standing stones or pods
nodes.norm_label: contour canyon terraces — dense parallel contour lines forming tall bulging column/terrace shapes, repeating tessellated organic volumes like packed standing stones or pods

nodes.label: Flowing Ribbon Streamlines — A sinuous bundle of fine parallel streamlines forming a ribbon-like 3D tube that twists and bends through white space, minimal and elegant
nodes.norm_label: flowing ribbon streamlines — a sinuous bundle of fine parallel streamlines forming a ribbon-like 3d tube that twists and bends through white space, minimal and elegant

nodes.label: Vortex Flowlines — A dark field of horizontal wavering flowfield lines pulled sharply into a bright central vortex/attractor sink, dramatic radial convergence
nodes.norm_label: vortex flowlines — a dark field of horizontal wavering flowfield lines pulled sharply into a bright central vortex/attractor sink, dramatic radial convergence

nodes.label: City — Isometric aerial city of skyscrapers rendered entirely in dense vertical hatching lines with strong perspective convergence, plotter-pen aesthetic, B&W
nodes.norm_label: city — isometric aerial city of skyscrapers rendered entirely in dense vertical hatching lines with strong perspective convergence, plotter-pen aesthetic, b&w

nodes.label: Contour Crater Depression — Intricate swirling contour lines forming a large bowl/crater depression with feathered sub-forms, fractal-like self-similar nesting
nodes.norm_label: contour crater depression — intricate swirling contour lines forming a large bowl/crater depression with feathered sub-forms, fractal-like self-similar nesting

nodes.label: Spiral Halftone Figure — Dense Archimedean spiral lines used as halftone to render a human figure (portrait/bust), spiral tightens in dark areas, expands in light areas
nodes.norm_label: spiral halftone figure — dense archimedean spiral lines used as halftone to render a human figure (portrait/bust), spiral tightens in dark areas, expands in light areas

nodes.label: Neon Scanline Totem — Neon cyan horizontal scanlines on black background, multiple stacked waveform segments that spell out a face/totem shape through local line displacement
nodes.norm_label: neon scanline totem — neon cyan horizontal scanlines on black background, multiple stacked waveform segments that spell out a face/totem shape through local line displacement
